title: Segfault when updating table with generated columns
poc: CREATE TEMP TABLE t0(c0, c1 AS(1) CHECK(NULL) UNIQUE NOT NULL, c2 CHECK(1.0) PRIMARY KEY) WITHOUT ROWID;
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX e ON t0(CAST(0.0 AS INT)) WHERE 0;
REPLACE INTO t0(c2, c0) VALUES (0, 0), (x'9b', NULL);
key_bug_features: UPDATE statement on table with generated columns
bug_features_seed: CREATE TEMP TABLE t1(a INTEGER, b TEXT, c AS (a + 1) CHECK(c > 0) UNIQUE NOT NULL);
UPDATE t1 SET a = NULL WHERE b = 'test';
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c IS NOT NULL;
